items.title: Biomechanical Comparison of Suture Anchor Fixations in Rotator Cuff Repair
items.publicationTitle: Journal of Shoulder and Elbow Surgery
items.abstractNote: BACKGROUND: Suture anchor fixation is critical for rotator cuff repair. We compared pull-out strength across 3 anchor types.

items.title: Machine Learning Prediction of Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury Risk in Athletes
items.abstractNote: PURPOSE: To develop and validate an ML model for predicting ACL injury risk using biomechanical and demographic features.

items.title: Platelet-Rich Plasma for Knee Osteoarthritis: RCT
items.abstractNote: OBJECTIVE: To evaluate PRP injections vs hyaluronic acid for symptomatic knee OA in a double-blind RCT (n=192).
